name: NEPHROS INC
summary: Nephros Inc. is a commercial-stage company that develops and markets high-performance point-of-use water filtration solutions with a core focus on medical-grade water filtration. Products include FDA 510(k)-cleared ultrafilters (0.005 micron) and microfilters (0.1 micron) for infection control and dialysis, as well as commercial filters addressing taste, odor, lead, scale, cysts, and Total PFAS reduction. Nephros serves hospitals, dialysis centers, foodservice, laboratories, manufacturing, aviation, and government facilities through direct sales and value-added reseller channels.

products.name: Ultrafilters (0.005 micron)
products.description: FDA 510(k)-cleared Class II medical devices retaining bacteria, viruses, and endotoxins for infection control and dialysis water purification.

products.name: Microfilters (0.1 micron)
products.description: FDA 510(k)-cleared Class II medical devices retaining bacteria including Legionella for infection control in healthcare settings.

products.name: Commercial Water Filters
products.description: Carbon-based and carbon-free filters reducing taste, odor, scale, particulate, lead, cysts, and Total PFAS from water systems.

products.name: Total PFAS Reduction Filter
products.description: Newly released filter validated for reduction of seven PFAS compounds including PFOA, PFOS, PFHxS, PFNA, PFHpA, PFBS, and PFDA.

partnerships.description: Non-exclusive distributors selling both medical and commercial Nephros filters across healthcare and various commercial/industrial sectors.
One non-exclusive VAR partner focused solely on food service and hospitality sectors including QSRs, convenience stores, and restaurants.
